cards.name: 9 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: rewarded efforts, success, achievement, independence, leisure, material security, self-sufficiency

cards.name: ⅩⅩ Judgement
cards.interpretation: self-evaluation, awakening, renewal, purpose, reflection, reckoning

cards.name: 3 of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: restriction, limitations, lack of progress, obstacles, delays, frustration
